allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix music video generation - switch to Fal.ai for synchronous delivery

- Changed music video generation from KIE.AI to Fal.ai Seedance API
- Fal.ai returns videos synchronously (no polling needed)
- Added comprehensive logging and error handling
- Added timeout mechanism (10 minutes max)
- Videos now display immediately when ready
- Added generate-video-fal.js to vercel.json with 60s timeout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Switch album art generation from SUNO polling to OpenAI DALL-E 3

- Replaced async SUNO API (/api/generate-cover) with synchronous DALL-E 3 (/api/generate-art)
- Album art now generates instantly without polling
- Generates art based on track title with music-themed prompts
- Added comprehensive logging for debugging
- Shows DALL-E''s enhanced prompt in the UI
- No more stuck "processing" states for album art

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix download buttons to actually download instead of preview

- Added downloadFile() helper function using fetch and blob API
- Replaced all <a> download links with <button> onclick handlers
- Downloads now work properly for videos and images
- Bypasses CORS issues and forces actual file download
- Applies to music videos, album art, and media panel downloads

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
